taskSuccess.evidence: Actual MCP Client + StdioClientTransport current rerun produced inline image+text on 4/4 calls: two whatsapp and two whatsapp-group attempts.

visualFidelity.evidence: Competitor evidence was recaptured with exactly the frozen two-message/two-attachment input after deleting FakeDetail's default message and setting reaction to none. Both current production previews show the same two texts/times and attachments with repeated mockscreenshots.com watermarking. FakeDetail displays the entered 09:41/09:42 values as 9:41/9:42; this formatting variance is disclosed.

workflowUsability.evidence: One optional image object per message; image-only and mixed messages supported; existing text-only request remains unchanged.

speed.evidence: Current production attempts completed in 297 ms, 38 ms, 33 ms, and 33 ms; full local suite completed in under 4 seconds.

robustness.evidence: Tests cover missing/malformed/spoofed/oversize/SVG/non-WhatsApp inputs, 8,000-character endpoint limit, failures, timeout, MIME/signature validation, and preview response bounds. Two earlier group HTTP 500s returned safe text-link fallback and remain disclosed.

accessibility.evidence: Attachment alt text is accepted, trimmed, capped at 160 characters, and defaults to Attached image, matching the site contract.

outputExport.evidence: Current rerun returned inline PNG plus hosted/edit URLs on 4/4 attempts. Two earlier whatsapp-group HTTP 500 attempts returned text-only hosted/edit fallback, not inline success; fallback retained the ethics warning and is explicitly recorded.

mcpParity.evidence: Public MCP schema emits the merged optional m[].im contract for WhatsApp and whatsapp-group; actual stdio handshake and current production render paths passed.

commands.productionProtocol: node docs/pr-evidence/whatsapp-image-attachments/capture-production.mjs (current: 4/4 inline image+text successes; historical release-review: 2/2 whatsapp-group HTTP 500 text-link fallbacks)

protocolDefinitions.inlineImageAndTextSuccess: MCP content includes image and text; text includes hosted/edit URLs and ethics warning.
protocolDefinitions.textLinkFallback: MCP content includes text only because the production preview render failed; hosted/edit URLs and ethics warning remain available. This is graceful degradation, not inline success.

historicalObservation: Release review reported two real whatsapp-group HTTP 500 responses at the reviewed SHA. Both correctly produced text-link fallback. The current four-attempt rerun recovered, but the prior failures are not hidden or relabeled.
